Author

Jhonatan Dali Fernandez Rojas, Kevin Orlando Gomez Cruz, Isaac Gilardy Santillan Gil, Britney Emeli Tapia Chavarry, Jhoneyda Emelis Vera Campos, Jhener Ivan Visalot Chappa

2 Data import

Code 
library(readxl)
fb <- read_excel("C:/Users/hp/Downloads/examen_3u.xlsx")
View(fb)
Code 
# Install packages and dependencies

library(GerminaR)
library(ellmer)

3 Análisis de Datos

Code 
# germination analysis 

gsm <- ger_summary(factors = c("accesion", "nacl")
                   , SeedN = "seed"
                   , evalName = "G_"
                   , cumulative = FALSE
                   , data = fb
                   )

view(gsm)

4 Diseño experimental

Diseño de bloques completamente alazar (DBCA)

\[ y = u +accesion+nacl+(accesion*nacl)+bloque+e\] # Percentaje de germinación

Code 

## Germination Percentage (GRP)

# analysis of variance

# anova

av <- aov(grp ~ accesion*nacl + block, data = gsm)

anova(av)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: grp
##                Df Sum Sq Mean Sq  F value              Pr(>F)    
## accesion       20 202378 10118.9 104.0080 <0.0000000000000002 ***
## nacl            4  86780 21695.0 222.9940 <0.0000000000000002 ***
## block           1      1     1.0   0.0107              0.9178    
## accesion:nacl  80  33371   417.1   4.2876 <0.0000000000000002 ***
## Residuals     314  30549    97.3                                 
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1

# mean comparison test

mc_grp <- ger_testcomp(aov = av
                       , comp = c("accesion", "nacl")
                       , type = "snk"
                       )

# data result

mc_grp$table %>% 
   kable(caption = "Germination percentage mean comparision")

Code 

# bar graphics for germination percentage

library(dplyr)

# Ordenar los niveles de la accesión
mc_grp$table <- mc_grp$table %>%
  mutate(accesion = factor(accesion,
                           levels = paste0("a", 1:21)))

grp <- mc_grp$table %>%
  fplot(
    data = .,
    type = "bar",
    x = "accesion",
    y = "grp",
    group = "nacl",
    ylimits = c(0, 130, 30),
    ylab = "Germinación ('%')",
    xlab = "Accesiones",
    glab = "NaCl (mM)",
    error = "ste",
    sig = "sig",
    color = TRUE
  )

grp

ggsave(
  filename = "C:/Users/hp/Desktop/Nueva carpeta/ porcentaje germinación.tiff",
  plot = grp,
  width = 12,
  height = 7,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 600,
  compression = "lzw"

6 Tiempo medio de germinación

Code 

## Mean Germination Time (MGT)

# analysis of variance

# anova

av2 <- aov(mgt ~ accesion*nacl + block, data = gsm)

anova(av2)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: mgt
##                Df Sum Sq Mean Sq  F value                Pr(>F)    
## accesion       20 258.17  12.909  53.8845 < 0.00000000000000022 ***
## nacl            4 602.62 150.655 628.8771 < 0.00000000000000022 ***
## block           1   0.01   0.012   0.0488              0.825248    
## accesion:nacl  78  29.55   0.379   1.5813              0.003507 ** 
## Residuals     304  72.83   0.240                                   
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1

# mean comparison test

mc_mgt <- ger_testcomp(aov = av2
                       , comp = c("accesion", "nacl")
                       , type = "snk")
Code 

library(dplyr)

# Ordenar las accesiones
mc_mgt$table <- mc_mgt$table %>%
  mutate(accesion = factor(accesion,
                           levels = paste0("a", 1:21)))

mgt <- mc_mgt$table %>%
  fplot(
    data = .,
    type = "bar",
    x = "accesion",
    y = "mgt",
    group = "nacl",
    ylimits = c(0, 10, 1),
    ylab = "Tiempo medio de germinación (días)",
    xlab = "Accesiones",
    glab = "NaCl (mM)",
    sig = "sig",
    error = "ste",
    color = TRUE
  )

mgt

8 Velocidad de germinación

Code 
## Germination Speed Parameter (GSP)

# analysis of variance

# anova

av3 <- aov(gsp ~ accesion*nacl + block, data = gsm)

anova(av3)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: gsp
##                Df Sum Sq Mean Sq  F value                Pr(>F)    
## accesion       20   9268   463.4  41.4883 < 0.00000000000000022 ***
## nacl            4  32980  8245.0 738.1863 < 0.00000000000000022 ***
## block           1      8     7.6   0.6843                0.4088    
## accesion:nacl  78   2825    36.2   3.2425    0.0000000000002048 ***
## Residuals     304   3395    11.2                                   
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1

# mean comparison test

mc_gsp <- ger_testcomp(aov = av3
                       , comp = c("accesion", "nacl")
                       , type = "snk")
Code

# Ordenar las accesiones
mc_gsp$table <- mc_gsp$table %>%
  mutate(accesion = factor(accesion,
                           levels = paste0("a", 1:21)))

gsp <- mc_gsp$table %>%
  fplot(
    data = .,
    type = "bar",
    x = "accesion",
    y = "gsp",
    group = "nacl",
    ylimits = c(0, 60, 5),
    ylab = "Velocidad de germinación",
    xlab = "Accesiones",
    glab = "NaCl (mM)",
    sig = "sig",
    error = "ste",
    color = TRUE
  )

10 Sincronia de Germinación

Code 
## Germination synchrony(SYN)

# analysis of variance

# anova

av4 <- aov(syn ~ accesion*nacl + block, data = gsm)

anova(av4)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: syn
##                Df Sum Sq Mean Sq  F value                Pr(>F)    
## accesion       20 5.2870 0.26435  13.9633 < 0.00000000000000022 ***
## nacl            4 9.6703 2.41758 127.7000 < 0.00000000000000022 ***
## block           1 0.0058 0.00578   0.3055                0.5809    
## accesion:nacl  77 3.5289 0.04583   2.4208         0.00000005459 ***
## Residuals     298 5.6417 0.01893                                   
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1

# mean comparison test

mc_syn <- ger_testcomp(aov = av4
                       , comp = c("accesion", "nacl")
                       , type = "snk")
Code 
library(dplyr)

# Ordenar las accesiones
mc_syn$table <- mc_syn$table %>%
  mutate(accesion = factor(accesion,
                           levels = paste0("a", 1:21)))

syn <- mc_syn$table %>%
  fplot(
    data = .,
    type = "bar",
    x = "accesion",
    y = "syn",
    group = "nacl",
    ylimits = c(0, 1.2, 0.4),
    ylab = "Sincronia de germinación",
    xlab = "Accesiones",
    glab = "NaCl (mM)",
    sig = "sig",
    error = "ste",
    color = TRUE
  )

syn

12 Germinación acumulada de germinación

Code 
# Convertir caracteres numericos
fb[, grep("^G_", names(fb))] <- lapply(
  fb[, grep("^G_", names(fb))],
  function(x) as.numeric(as.character(x))
)
Code 

# data frame with percentage or relative germination in time by NaCl

git <- ger_intime(Factor = "nacl"
                  , SeedN = "seed"
                  , evalName = "G_"
                  , method = "percentage"
                  , data = as.data.frame(fb)
                  )
Code 

# graphic germination in time by NaCl

nacl <- git %>% 
   fplot(data = .
        , type = "line"
        , x = "evaluation"
        , y = "mean"
        , group = "nacl"
        , ylimits = c(0, 120, 10)
        , ylab = "Germinación Acumulada"
        , xlab = "Días"
        , glab = "Nacl (mM)"
        , color = T
        , error = "ste"
        )
nacl

#PCA

Code 
library(FactoMineR)
library(factoextra)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)

#-------------------------------------------------
# 1. Preparar los datos
#-------------------------------------------------
gsm_clean <- gsm %>%
  dplyr::select(accesion, nacl, grp, mgt, gsp, syn) %>%
  mutate(
    accesion = as.character(accesion),
    nacl = as.factor(nacl),
    across(c(grp, mgt, gsp, syn), as.numeric)
  ) %>%
  filter(if_all(c(grp, mgt, gsp, syn), ~ is.finite(.)))

#-------------------------------------------------
# 2. Análisis de Componentes Principales (PCA)
#-------------------------------------------------
mv <- PCA(
  gsm_clean[, c("grp", "mgt", "gsp", "syn")],
  scale.unit = TRUE,
  graph = FALSE
)

#-------------------------------------------------
# 3. Coordenadas de los individuos
#-------------------------------------------------
coord <- as.data.frame(mv$ind$coord)
coord$accesion <- gsm_clean$accesion

coord$nacl <- factor(
  gsm_clean$nacl,
  levels = sort(unique(gsm_clean$nacl)),
  labels = paste0(sort(unique(gsm_clean$nacl)), " mM")
)

#-------------------------------------------------
# 4. PCA - Individuos
#-------------------------------------------------
p_ind <- ggplot(coord, aes(Dim.1, Dim.2, color = nacl)) +

  # Cruz central
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.4, colour = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.4, colour = "black") +

  # Puntos
  geom_point(size = 3) +

  # Etiquetas
  geom_text_repel(
    aes(label = accesion),
    size = 3,
    max.overlaps = Inf
  ) +

  # Elipses
  stat_ellipse(
    aes(group = nacl),
    level = 0.95,
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +

  labs(
    title = "PCA - Individuos",
    x = paste0("PC1 (", round(mv$eig[1,2],1), "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", round(mv$eig[2,2],1), "%)"),
    color = "NaCl"
  ) +

  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +

  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

#-------------------------------------------------
# 5. PCA - Variables
#-------------------------------------------------
p_var <- fviz_pca_var(
  mv,
  col.var = "cos2",
  gradient.cols = c("#00AFBB", "#E7B800", "#FC4E07"),
  repel = TRUE,
  title = "PCA - Variables"
)

#-------------------------------------------------
# 6. Mostrar gráficos
#-------------------------------------------------
p_ind
Code 
p_var

14 Código para descargar imagenes TIFF

Code 
library(ggplot2)

ggsave(
  filename = "C:/Users/hp/Desktop/Nueva carpeta/ pca ind.tiff",
  plot = p_ind,
  width = 12,
  height = 7,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 600,
  compression = "lzw"
)
